briefdescription.para: Shift value to double the curve length.
Command ID for ECC sign generation.
Command ID for ECC sign verification.
Command ID for ECC KAT.
Command ID for ECDH generate shared secret.
Command ID for ECDH KAT.
Command ID for ECC public key generation.
Command ID for ECC public key validation.
Maximum number of commands supported by ECC module.
NIST P-256 curve.
NIST P-384 curve.
NIST P-192 curve.
NIST P-224 curve.
NIST P-521 curve.
Brainpool P-256 curve.
Brainpool P-320 curve.
Brainpool P-384 curve.
Brainpool P-512 curve.
NIST ED25519 curve.
NIST ED448 curve.
NIST Hash-ED25519 curve.
NIST Hash-ED448 curve.
Curve25519 curve.
Curve448 curve.
Size of NIST P-192 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-224 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-256 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-320 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-384 private key size in bytes.
Size of Brainpool P-512 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-521 private key size in bytes.
Size of Edwards Ed448 private key size in bytes.
Size of Curve448 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-521 public key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-384 public key size in bytes.
This function is to get the double curve length.
This file contains the ECC definitions which are common across the client and server.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 yog 07/11/24 Initial release yog 08/19/24 Added XAsu_EccParams structure, module command ID's and curve type values ss 12/02/24 Added support for ECDH yog 03/25/25 Added XAsu_EccKeyParams structure and XASU_ECC_GEN_PUBKEY_CMD_ID. yog 07/11/25 Added XASU_ECC_P448_SIZE_IN_BYTES macro and updated curve type macro values.
